children.heading: .—Definition
children.label: a .—Definition
children.text: In this chapter, the term “Federal Government” has the same meaning that the term “United States” had in the Contract Work Hours and Safety Standards Act (, ).Public Law 87–58176 Stat. 357

children.label: A
children.text: any contract that may require or involve the employment of laborers or mechanics on a public work of the Federal Government, a territory of the United States, or the District of Columbia; and

children.label: i
children.text: to which the Government, an agency or instrumentality of the Government, a territory, or the District of Columbia is a party;

children.label: ii
children.text: which is made for or on behalf of the Government, an agency or instrumentality, a territory, or the District of Columbia; or

children.label: iii
children.text: which is a contract for work financed at least in part by loans or grants from, or loans insured or guaranteed by, the Government or an agency or instrumentality under any federal law providing wage standards for the work.

children.label: A
children.text: including watchmen, guards, and workers performing services in connection with dredging or rock excavation in any river or harbor of the United States, a territory, or the District of Columbia; but

children.label: B
children.text: not including an employee employed as a seaman.

children.label: I
children.text: transportation by land, air, or water;

children.label: III
children.text: the purchase of supplies or materials or articles ordinarily available in the open market;

children.label: ii
children.text: any work required to be done in accordance with the provisions of chapter 65 of title 41; and

children.label: iii
children.text: a contract in an amount that is not greater than $100,000.

children.heading: .—Section 3702
children.label: B .—Section 3702
children.text: does not apply to work where the assistance described in paragraph (1)(B)(iii) from the Government or an agency or instrumentality is only a loan guarantee or insurance.Section 3702 of this title
